subject: App Crash Report - Urgent
body: Hi Support, My app crashes immediately when I tap on the Projects tab. Samsung Galaxy S23 with Android 14. App version 3.0.1. Steps: 1) Open app 2) Tap Projects tab 3) App crashes instantly.

subject: Login Issue Since Update
body: I updated the app and now cannot log in. Screen goes white after entering password. iPhone 14 Pro running iOS 17.4. Tried reinstalling but problem persists.

subject: Lost All My Data
body: After the latest update all my tasks disappeared completely. Using OnePlus 11 Android 13. Please recover my data immediately.

subject: Feature Request Dark Mode
body: Please add dark mode. I use the app late at night and the bright white screen is very hard on my eyes. Many users are also asking for this.

subject: Suggestion Calendar Integration
body: Please integrate with Google Calendar and Outlook. I manually copy task deadlines to my calendar which is very tedious.

subject: App Very Slow on My Device
body: App is extremely slow after 3.0.1 update. Takes 8-10 seconds to load on Redmi Note 12. Phone has 4GB RAM and runs Android 12.

subject: Notification Bug Report
body: Push notifications completely stopped working since version 3.0.1. All settings are enabled. Using Pixel 7 with Android 14.

subject: Subscription Too Expensive
body: Premium subscription at Rs 499 per month is too expensive. Todoist and TickTick offer similar features at lower prices.

subject: Request for Team Collaboration
body: Our company has 15 employees who want to use this app collaboratively. Please add task assignment and shared project views.

subject: File Attachment Crash
body: Every time I attach a PDF or image to a task the app crashes. iPhone 12 iOS 16.5 version 2.9.5. Steps: 1) Create task 2) Tap attach 3) Select file 4) App crashes.
